commit_scope: Broaden the Form-native summary source-reader floor from one checked-in file to dynamic source-coordinate rows across file, store, route, and stream protocols, with physical file and file-backed store receipts plus explicit planned route and stream lanes.

local_validation.notes: Prompt guide passed on branch codex/summary-multi-source-receipts-20260614 and wellness reported no required repair before editing. The new text-summary-multi-source-band returned 65535 on Go/Rust/TypeScript as a 3-kernel only host-I/O proof: it read a real checked-in file slice, wrote a real temporary segmented cell-log store row, read the store value back through cls-get, aggregated both ready source-data receipts, and kept route and stream as explicit planned coordinates. The existing text-summary-real-source-band returned 8191 after updating self-documenting byte offsets. The existing text-summary-learning-band still returned 262143 and validate.sh printed fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables). The dependent llm-feature-channel-floor band still returned 131071 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed yet; CI not run at evidence creation time.

deploy_validation.summary: Local Form proof and docs only. No public deploy was performed at evidence creation time.

phase_gate.gate: Cells and recipes can plan source summaries through typed file, store, route, and stream coordinates, and only ready physical receipts can feed learning.
phase_gate.next: Add physical route response body receipts and stream cursor window receipts so kernel:route and stream:read move from planned coordinates to ready source-data receipts.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form now exposes source-coordinate rows for file, store, route, and stream summary inputs. File and file-backed store inputs can produce ready source-data receipts and aggregate into one summary CHOICE-RECEIPT; route and stream inputs are discoverable planned lanes until native readers are added.
test_flows: text:summarize-file, text:summarize-store, text:summarize-route, and text:summarize-stream return explicit protocol and capability plans.
A file coordinate reads an exact source byte slice through read_file_slice and becomes a valid source-data receipt.
A store coordinate writes and reads a source value through the real segmented cell-log store before becoming a valid source-data receipt.
Route and stream coordinates are represented as planned native options and do not masquerade as executed data.
Ready file and store receipts aggregate claims and citations into a multi-source summary and CHOICE-RECEIPT training sample.
e2e_validation.summary: This keeps physical proof honest: file and store are locally executed host-I/O receipts; route and stream are native coordinate plans awaiting kernel source readers, not placeholders or mock execution.
